note: Parity fixtures generated from the LIVE TrailSense backend functions. Representation: backend Date(t) <-> C ts_ms=t (uint32); macHash hex <-> mac_hash[4]. Float compare tol: <=1 cm (and lat/lon projected to meters); EXACT on counts/enums/gates. multilaterate.backend_measurement_count is informational (C contract does not expose survivor count). The streaming open-window service case is intentionally omitted (stateless C library; design §4).
